title: [codereview-pass3-1] coap_status.c: cast to non-const for notify may not update resource->age if framework expects mutable resource
description: The lichen_coap_*_resource are defined as const. coap_resource_notify and the .notify callback use resource->age which is likely mutated by CoAP service when incrementing observe sequence. Cast bypasses const but doesn't solve root issue. Rejected removing const because task scoped to dead code functions only. Alternative: make resources non-const. P2 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-2op3
close_reason: replaced const cast in notify with proper guard and mutable handling per review, addressed all findings in 3 codereview loops, verified no dead code or debug output
